subject: Fw: Confirmation agreement for the French property Guermantes
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: FIGEROU <edouard.figerou.75024@paris.notaires.fr>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: "CPARPET@DARROISVILLEY.COM" <'CPARPET@DARROISVILLEY.COM'>
Sent: Tuesday, February 13, 2007 2:36:22 AM
Subject: Confirmation agreement for the French property Guermantes


HIGHLY CONFIDENTIAL

Dear Sir,

Following our email of February 9 and in view of our meeting scheduled
tomorrow afternoon with the seller's counsel, could you be kind enough
to sign the document that copy of it you will find attached here too.

Such document seems to be a perequisite to undertake any further legal
negociations.

If it is agreeable to you, then please date, indicate the signing place
and sign that document.

Once signed, thank you to fax the document to Me CHARDON, Mr FIGEROU at
+33.(0)1.53.43.10.01
and to <<_02091~3.PDF>> send the original by mail to the same persons at
the following address.

SCP CHARDON TARRADE LE PLEUX,
NOTAIRES
83, boulevard Haussmann
75008 PARIS
FRANCE

Best regards,

Bertrand Chardon/ Edouard Figerou


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
Cheap talk?

http://voice.yahoo.com
